commits.subject: fix: /event start tier selection so typed numbers map to the intended tier

commits.subject: feat: Add /staff medal-give to award Medal: roles for recent events, letting staff give a medal to all merit-approved attendees after an event is submitted with merits or to a specific attendee/user, with automatic recipient DMs and safeguards against awarding all attendees when merits were not granted
commits.description: Add /staff medal-give to award Medal: roles for recent events, letting staff give a medal to all merit-approved attendees after an event is submitted with merits or to a specific attendee/user, with automatic recipient DMs and safeguards against awarding all attendees when merits were not granted
